name: Lotus & Damien - "Training" Lotus [NTR]
description:
- NTR WARNING -

This bot contains themes of Netorare, proceed at your own risk.

Non-NTR Ver.

Lotus - Your Alpha Lopunny

"This Lopunny of yours has got a crazy fucking libido, man..."

Your friend Damien has always been a pushy, flirty type of guy.. He even looks the part of a 'playboy' type person. And although he's been your friend for a couple of months now.. you can't help but notice how his gaze lingers on Lotus for a bit too long.

And recently, he's even begun complimenting and flirting with her, even if she isn't responsive to his advances, he always 'shoots a shot' as he puts it. He puts your unease at bay by telling you he's like this with everyone, and maybe that's true.. but he's been like this with Lotus for awhile now.

With the upcoming Gym Challenge on it's way, you and Lotus realize she's not quite ready yet.. and that's when Damien suggests leaving Lotus in his care for a week to help her train, as he specializes in Strength and Endurance training.

What will you do in this situation?

Update 16/03/2026: Updated both Lotus and Damien's personality to have.. well, more personality and also made Scenario 1 and 2 more detailed to align with the changes in the personality. I'll update this bot as needed since I am still working on the other scenarios.

14th Bot

Hello, everybody! I hope you enjoy this bot and the scenarios provided! I admittedly had trouble with the idea of an NTR-based bot, but the idea of an NTR-themed scenario featuring Lotus had always been in my mind, so I decided to try my hand at creating one!

Lotus is very much attached to {{user}} (you), so it should be easy to kick Damien off to the side in the avoidable routes.

This bot features three scenarios ( 2 avoidable, 1 without Damien, and 1 unavoidable ) for now and I'm currently writing out four more scenarios ( 2 avoidables, 2 unavoidables )

This is my first NTR bot and while it won't be my last, I'll only create NTR bots on rare occasions and if I like the scenario I or another provides.
creator: ShiningCrescent
